name: fiber-lsp-kit
description: Liquidity-service (LSP) protocol, reference server, and client SDK for Fiber Network — buy inbound liquidity, per asset.

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/protocol packages/fiber packages/registry packages/lsp-server packages/client packages/prover-linked
scripts.demo:lsp: npm run build && NETWORK=${NETWORK:-local} node scripts/theater/lsp.mjs
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/protocol packages/fiber packages/registry packages/lsp-server packages/client packages/prover-linked
scripts.test: npm run build && node --import tsx --test packages/*/test/*.test.ts
scripts.test:live: npm run build && node --import tsx --test packages/*/test/integration/*.test.ts
scripts.server: npm run build && npm -w @fiberlsp/server run start
